sn36.25:1.1:
1
"‘These are feelings’: thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light.
sn36.25:1.2: "‘This is the origin of feeling’: thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision … and light.
sn36.25:1.3: "‘This is the way leading to the origination of feeling’: thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision … and light.
sn36.25:1.4: "‘This is the cessation of feeling’: thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision … and light.
sn36.25:1.5: "‘This is the way leading to the cessation of feeling’: thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision … and light.
sn36.25:1.6: "‘This is the gratification in feeling’ … ‘This is the danger in feeling’ … ‘This is the escape from feeling’: thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light."
